enum

Possible error codes that can be returned by `SubscriptionBillingCycleBulkUserError`.

### Valid values

* BLANK

  The input value is blank.

* END\_вЂ‹DATE\_вЂ‹IN\_вЂ‹THE\_вЂ‹FUTURE

  End date can't be more than 24 hours in the future.

* INVALID

  The input value is invalid.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹DATE\_вЂ‹RANGE

  The range between start date and end date shouldn't be more than 1 week.

* START\_вЂ‹DATE\_вЂ‹BEFORE\_вЂ‹END\_вЂ‹DATE

  Start date should be before end date.

<a id="subscription-billing-cycle-error-code"></a>

## SubscriptionвЂ‹BillingвЂ‹CycleвЂ‹ErrorвЂ‹Code

enum

Possible error codes that can be returned by `SubscriptionBillingCycleUserError`.

### Valid values

* BILLING\_вЂ‹DATE\_вЂ‹SET\_вЂ‹ON\_вЂ‹SKIPPED

  Billing date cannot be set on skipped billing cycle.

* CYCLE\_вЂ‹INDEX\_вЂ‹OUT\_вЂ‹OF\_вЂ‹RANGE

  Billing cycle selector cannot select billing cycle outside of index range.

* CYCLE\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹FOUND

  Can't find the billing cycle.

* CYCLE\_вЂ‹START\_вЂ‹DATE\_вЂ‹OUT\_вЂ‹OF\_вЂ‹RANGE

  Billing cycle selector cannot select billing cycle outside of start date range.

* EMPTY\_вЂ‹BILLING\_вЂ‹CYCLE\_вЂ‹EDIT\_вЂ‹SCHEDULE\_вЂ‹INPUT

  Billing cycle schedule edit input provided is empty. Must take in parameters to modify schedule.

* INCOMPLETE\_вЂ‹BILLING\_вЂ‹ATTEMPTS

  Billing cycle has incomplete billing attempts in progress.

* INVALID

  The input value is invalid.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹CYCLE\_вЂ‹INDEX

  The index selector is invalid.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹DATE

  The date selector is invalid.

* NO\_вЂ‹CYCLE\_вЂ‹EDITS

  There's no contract or schedule edit associated with the targeted billing cycle(s).

* OUT\_вЂ‹OF\_вЂ‹BOUNDS

  Billing date of a cycle cannot be set to a value outside of its billing date range.

* UPCOMING\_вЂ‹CYCLE\_вЂ‹LIMIT\_вЂ‹EXCEEDED

  Billing cycle selector cannot select upcoming billing cycle past limit.

***

### Fields

* [SubscriptionвЂ‹BillingвЂ‹CycleвЂ‹UserвЂ‹Error.code](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionBillingCycleUserError#field-SubscriptionBillingCycleUserError.fields.code)

<a id="subscription-contract-last-billing-error-type"></a>

## SubscriptionвЂ‹ContractвЂ‹LastвЂ‹BillingвЂ‹ErrorвЂ‹Type

enum

The possible values of the last billing error on a subscription contract.

### Valid values

* CUSTOMER\_вЂ‹ERROR

  Subscription billing attempt error due to customer error.

* INVENTORY\_вЂ‹ERROR

  Subscription billing attempt error due to inventory error.

* OTHER

  All other billing attempt errors.

* PAYMENT\_вЂ‹ERROR

  Subscription billing attempt error due to payment error.

***

### Fields

* [SubscriptionвЂ‹Contract.lastBillingAttemptErrorType](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionContract#field-SubscriptionContract.fields.lastBillingAttemptErrorType)

  OBJECT

  A subscription contract that defines recurring purchases for a customer. Each contract specifies what products to deliver, when to bill and ship them, and at what price.

  The contract includes [`SubscriptionBillingPolicy`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionBillingPolicy) and [`SubscriptionDeliveryPolicy`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionDeliveryPolicy) that control the frequency of charges and fulfillments. [`SubscriptionLine`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionLine) items define the products, quantities, and pricing for each recurring [`Order`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/Order). The contract tracks [`SubscriptionBillingAttempt`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionBillingAttempt) records, payment status, and generated orders throughout its lifecycle. [`App`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/App) instances manage contracts through various status transitions including active, paused, failed, cancelled, or expired states.

  Learn more about [building subscription contracts](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/purchase-options/subscriptions/contracts/build-a-subscription-contract) and [updating subscription contracts](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/purchase-options/subscriptions/contracts/update-a-subscription-contract).

***

### Map

#### Fields with this enum

* [SubscriptionвЂ‹Contract.lastBillingAttemptErrorType](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionContract#field-SubscriptionContract.fields.lastBillingAttemptErrorType)

[`SubscriptionLine`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionLine) items define the products, quantities, and pricing for each recurring [`Order`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/Order). The contract tracks [`SubscriptionBillingAttempt`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionBillingAttempt) records, payment status, and generated orders throughout its lifecycle. [`App`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/App) instances manage contracts through various status transitions including active, paused, failed, cancelled, or expired states.

<a id="subscription-contract-subscription-status"></a>

## SubscriptionвЂ‹ContractвЂ‹SubscriptionвЂ‹Status

enum

The possible status values of a subscription.

### Valid values

* ACTIVE

  The contract is active and continuing per its policies.

* CANCELLED

  The contract was ended by an unplanned customer action.

* EXPIRED

  The contract has ended per the expected circumstances. All billing and deliverycycles of the subscriptions were executed.

* FAILED

  The contract ended because billing failed and no further billing attempts are expected.

* PAUSED

  The contract is temporarily paused and is expected to resume in the future.

***

### Fields

* [SubscriptionвЂ‹BillingвЂ‹CycleвЂ‹BulkвЂ‹Filters.contractStatus](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/input-objects/SubscriptionBillingCycleBulkFilters#fields-contractStatus)

  INPUT OBJECT

  The input fields for filtering subscription billing cycles in bulk actions.

* [SubscriptionвЂ‹Contract.status](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionContract#field-SubscriptionContract.fields.status)

  OBJECT

  A subscription contract that defines recurring purchases for a customer. Each contract specifies what products to deliver, when to bill and ship them, and at what price.

  The contract includes [`SubscriptionBillingPolicy`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionBillingPolicy) and [`SubscriptionDeliveryPolicy`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionDeliveryPolicy) that control the frequency of charges and fulfillments. [`SubscriptionLine`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionLine) items define the products, quantities, and pricing for each recurring [`Order`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/Order). The contract tracks [`SubscriptionBillingAttempt`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionBillingAttempt) records, payment status, and generated orders throughout its lifecycle. [`App`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/App) instances manage contracts through various status transitions including active, paused, failed, cancelled, or expired states.

  Learn more about [building subscription contracts](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/purchase-options/subscriptions/contracts/build-a-subscription-contract) and [updating subscription contracts](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/purchase-options/subscriptions/contracts/update-a-subscription-contract).

* [SubscriptionвЂ‹Draft.status](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionDraft#field-SubscriptionDraft.fields.status)

  OBJECT

  The `SubscriptionDraft` object represents a draft version of a [subscription contract](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionContract) before it's committed. It serves as a staging area for making changes to an existing subscription or creating a new one. The draft allows you to preview and modify various aspects of a subscription before applying the changes.

  Use the `SubscriptionDraft` object to:

  * Add, remove, or modify subscription lines and their quantities
  * Manage discounts (add, remove, or update manual and code-based discounts)
  * Configure delivery options and shipping methods
  * Set up billing and delivery policies
  * Manage customer payment methods
  * Add custom attributes and notes to generated orders
  * Configure billing cycles and next billing dates
  * Preview the projected state of the subscription

  Each `SubscriptionDraft` object maintains a projected state that shows how the subscription will look after the changes are committed. This allows you to preview the impact of your modifications before applying them. The draft can be associated with an existing subscription contract (for modifications) or used to create a new subscription.

  The draft remains in a draft state until it's committed, at which point the changes are applied to the subscription contract and the draft is no longer accessible.

  Learn more about [how subscription contracts work](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/purchase-options/subscriptions/contracts) and how to [build](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/purchase-options/subscriptions/contracts/build-a-subscription-contract), [update](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/purchase-options/subscriptions/contracts/update-a-subscription-contract), and [combine](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/purchase-options/subscriptions/contracts/combine-subscription-contracts) subscription contracts.

* [SubscriptionвЂ‹DraftвЂ‹Input.status](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/input-objects/SubscriptionDraftInput#fields-status)

  INPUT OBJECT

  The input fields required to create a Subscription Draft.

***

### Map

#### Fields with this enum

* [SubscriptionвЂ‹Contract.status](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionContract#field-SubscriptionContract.fields.status)
* [SubscriptionвЂ‹Draft.status](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionDraft#field-SubscriptionDraft.fields.status)

<a id="subscription-discount-rejection-reason"></a>

## SubscriptionвЂ‹DiscountвЂ‹RejectionвЂ‹Reason

enum

The reason a discount on a subscription draft was rejected.

### Valid values

* CURRENTLY\_вЂ‹INACTIVE

  Discount is inactive.

* CUSTOMER\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹ELIGIBLE

  Given customer does not qualify for the discount.

* CUSTOMER\_вЂ‹USAGE\_вЂ‹LIMIT\_вЂ‹REACHED

  Customer usage limit has been reached.

* INCOMPATIBLE\_вЂ‹PURCHASE\_вЂ‹TYPE

  Purchase type does not qualify for the discount.

* INTERNAL\_вЂ‹ERROR

  Internal error during discount code validation.

* NO\_вЂ‹ENTITLED\_вЂ‹LINE\_вЂ‹ITEMS

  Discount does not apply to any of the given line items.

* NO\_вЂ‹ENTITLED\_вЂ‹SHIPPING\_вЂ‹LINES

  No applicable shipping lines.

* NOT\_вЂ‹FOUND

  Discount code is not found.

* PURCHASE\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹IN\_вЂ‹RANGE

  Purchase amount of items does not qualify for the discount.

* QUANTITY\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹IN\_вЂ‹RANGE

  Quantity of items does not qualify for the discount.

* USAGE\_вЂ‹LIMIT\_вЂ‹REACHED

  Discount usage limit has been reached.

***

### Fields

* [SubscriptionвЂ‹AppliedвЂ‹CodeвЂ‹Discount.rejectionReason](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionAppliedCodeDiscount#field-SubscriptionAppliedCodeDiscount.fields.rejectionReason)

  OBJECT

  Represents an applied code discount.

* [SubscriptionвЂ‹ManualвЂ‹Discount.rejectionReason](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionManualDiscount#field-SubscriptionManualDiscount.fields.rejectionReason)

  OBJECT

  Custom subscription discount.

***

* [SubscriptionвЂ‹ManualвЂ‹Discount.rejectionReason](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionManualDiscount#field-SubscriptionManualDiscount.fields.rejectionReason)

<a id="subscription-draft-error-code"></a>

## SubscriptionвЂ‹DraftвЂ‹ErrorвЂ‹Code

enum

Possible error codes that can be returned by `SubscriptionDraftUserError`.

### Valid values

* ALREADY\_вЂ‹REMOVED

  This line has already been removed.

* BILLING\_вЂ‹CYCLE\_вЂ‹ABSENT

  Cannot commit a contract draft with this mutation. Please use SubscriptionDraftCommit.

* BILLING\_вЂ‹CYCLE\_вЂ‹CONTRACT\_вЂ‹DRAFT\_вЂ‹BILLING\_вЂ‹POLICY\_вЂ‹INVALID

  Billing policy cannot be updated for billing cycle contract drafts.

* BILLING\_вЂ‹CYCLE\_вЂ‹CONTRACT\_вЂ‹DRAFT\_вЂ‹DELIVERY\_вЂ‹POLICY\_вЂ‹INVALID

  Delivery policy cannot be updated for billing cycle contract drafts.

* BILLING\_вЂ‹CYCLE\_вЂ‹PRESENT

  Cannot commit a billing cycle contract draft with this mutation. Please use SubscriptionBillingCycleContractDraftCommit.

* BLANK

  The input value is blank.

* COMMITTED

  Subscription draft has been already committed.

* CONCATENATION\_вЂ‹BILLING\_вЂ‹CYCLE\_вЂ‹CONTRACT\_вЂ‹DRAFT\_вЂ‹REQUIRED

  Contract draft must be a billing cycle contract draft for contract concatenation.

* CONCATENATION\_вЂ‹UNCOMMITTED\_вЂ‹CONTRACT\_вЂ‹DRAFT

  Cannot concatenate a contract draft from subscriptionContractCreate mutation.

* CURRENCY\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹ENABLED

  Currency is not enabled.

* CUSTOMER\_вЂ‹DOES\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹EXIST

  The customer doesn't exist.

* CUSTOMER\_вЂ‹MISMATCH

  The payment method customer must be the same as the contract customer.

* CUSTOMER\_вЂ‹REDACTED

  Customer is scheduled for redaction or has been redacted.

* CYCLE\_вЂ‹DISCOUNTS\_вЂ‹UNIQUE\_вЂ‹AFTER\_вЂ‹CYCLE

  The after cycle attribute must be unique between cycle discounts.

* CYCLE\_вЂ‹INDEX\_вЂ‹OUT\_вЂ‹OF\_вЂ‹RANGE

  Billing cycle selector cannot select billing cycle outside of index range.

* CYCLE\_вЂ‹SELECTOR\_вЂ‹VALIDATE\_вЂ‹ONE\_вЂ‹OF

  Billing cycle selector requires exactly one of index or date to be provided.

* CYCLE\_вЂ‹START\_вЂ‹DATE\_вЂ‹OUT\_вЂ‹OF\_вЂ‹RANGE

  Billing cycle selector cannot select billing cycle outside of start date range.

* DELIVERY\_вЂ‹METHOD\_вЂ‹REQUIRED

  The delivery method can't be blank if any lines require shipping.

* DELIVERY\_вЂ‹MUST\_вЂ‹BE\_вЂ‹MULTIPLE\_вЂ‹OF\_вЂ‹BILLING

  The delivery policy interval must be a multiple of the billing policy interval.

* DUPLICATE\_вЂ‹CONCATENATED\_вЂ‹CONTRACTS

  Concatenated contracts cannot contain duplicate subscription contracts.

* EXCEEDED\_вЂ‹MAX\_вЂ‹CONCATENATED\_вЂ‹CONTRACTS

  Maximum number of concatenated contracts on a billing cycle contract draft exceeded.

* GREATER\_вЂ‹THAN

  The input value should be greater than the minimum allowed value.

* GREATER\_вЂ‹THAN\_вЂ‹OR\_вЂ‹EQUAL\_вЂ‹TO

  The input value should be greater than or equal to the minimum value allowed.

* HAS\_вЂ‹FUTURE\_вЂ‹EDITS

  Cannot update a subscription contract with a current or upcoming billing cycle contract edit.

* INVALID

  The input value is invalid.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹ADJUSTMENT\_вЂ‹TYPE

  The adjustment value must the same type as the adjustment type.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹ADJUSTMENT\_вЂ‹VALUE

  The adjustment value must be either fixed\_value or percentage.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹BILLING\_вЂ‹DATE

  Next billing date is invalid.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹LINES

  Must have at least one line.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹NOTE\_вЂ‹LENGTH

  Note length is too long.

* LESS\_вЂ‹THAN

  The input value should be less than the maximum value allowed.

* LESS\_вЂ‹THAN\_вЂ‹OR\_вЂ‹EQUAL\_вЂ‹TO

  The input value should be less than or equal to the maximum value allowed.

* MISSING\_вЂ‹CUSTOMER\_вЂ‹PAYMENT\_вЂ‹METHOD

  Customer payment method is required.

* MISSING\_вЂ‹LOCAL\_вЂ‹DELIVERY\_вЂ‹OPTIONS

  The local delivery options must be set for local delivery.

* NO\_вЂ‹ENTITLED\_вЂ‹LINES

  Discount must have at least one entitled line.

* NOT\_вЂ‹AN\_вЂ‹INTEGER

  The value is not an integer.

* NOT\_вЂ‹IN\_вЂ‹RANGE

  Value is not in range.

* PRESENCE

  Input value is not present.

* SELLING\_вЂ‹PLAN\_вЂ‹MAX\_вЂ‹CYCLES\_вЂ‹MUST\_вЂ‹BE\_вЂ‹GREATER\_вЂ‹THAN\_вЂ‹MIN\_вЂ‹CYCLES

  The maximum number of cycles must be greater than the minimum.

* STALE\_вЂ‹CONTRACT

  Another operation updated the contract concurrently as the commit was in progress.

* TOO\_вЂ‹LONG

  The input value is too long.

* TOO\_вЂ‹SHORT

  The input value is too short.

* UPCOMING\_вЂ‹CYCLE\_вЂ‹LIMIT\_вЂ‹EXCEEDED

  Billing cycle selector cannot select upcoming billing cycle past limit.

***

### Fields

* [SubscriptionвЂ‹DraftвЂ‹UserвЂ‹Error.code](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/SubscriptionDraftUserError#field-SubscriptionDraftUserError.fields.code)

  OBJECT

  Represents a Subscription Draft error.

***

<a id="tax-exemption"></a>

## TaxвЂ‹Exemption

enum

Available customer tax exemptions.

### Valid values

* CA\_вЂ‹BC\_вЂ‹COMMERCIAL\_вЂ‹FISHERY\_вЂ‹EXEMPTION

  This customer is exempt from specific taxes for holding a valid COMMERCIAL\_FISHERY\_EXEMPTION in British Columbia.

* CA\_вЂ‹BC\_вЂ‹CONTRACTOR\_вЂ‹EXEMPTION

  This customer is exempt from specific taxes for holding a valid CONTRACTOR\_EXEMPTION in British Columbia.

* CA\_вЂ‹BC\_вЂ‹PRODUCTION\_вЂ‹AND\_вЂ‹MACHINERY\_вЂ‹EXEMPTION

  This customer is exempt from specific taxes for holding a valid PRODUCTION\_AND\_MACHINERY\_EXEMPTION in British Columbia.

* CA\_вЂ‹BC\_вЂ‹RESELLER\_вЂ‹EXEMPTION

  This customer is exempt from specific taxes for holding a valid RESELLER\_EXEMPTION in British Columbia.

* CA\_вЂ‹BC\_вЂ‹SUB\_вЂ‹CONTRACTOR\_вЂ‹EXEMPTION

  This customer is exempt from specific taxes for holding a valid SUB\_CONTRACTOR\_EXEMPTION in British Columbia.

* CA\_вЂ‹DIPLOMAT\_вЂ‹EXEMPTION

  This customer is exempt from specific taxes for holding a valid DIPLOMAT\_EXEMPTION in Canada.

* CA\_вЂ‹MB\_вЂ‹COMMERCIAL\_вЂ‹FISHERY\_вЂ‹EXEMPTION

  This customer is exempt from specific taxes for holding a valid COMMERCIAL\_FISHERY\_EXEMPTION in Manitoba.

* CA\_вЂ‹MB\_вЂ‹FARMER\_вЂ‹EXEMPTION

  This customer is exempt from specific taxes for holding a valid FARMER\_EXEMPTION in Manitoba.

  OBJECT

  Information about a customer of the shop, such as the customer's contact details, purchase history, and marketing preferences.

  Tracks the customer's total spending through the [`amountSpent`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/Customer#field-amountSpent) field and provides access to associated data such as payment methods and subscription contracts.

  ***

  **Caution:** Only use this data if it\&#39;s required for your app\&#39;s functionality. Shopify will restrict \<a href="https://shopify.dev/api/usage/access-scopes">access to scopes\</a> for apps that don\&#39;t have a legitimate use for the associated data.

<a id="tax-partner-state"></a>

## TaxвЂ‹PartnerвЂ‹State

enum

State of the tax app configuration.

### Valid values

* ACTIVE

  App is configured and to be used for tax calculations.

* PENDING

  App is not configured.

* READY

  App is configured, but not used for tax calculations.

enum

Possible error codes that can be returned by `ThemeCreateUserError`.

  Invalid theme role for theme creation.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹ZIP

  Must be a zip file.

  Theme creation is not allowed for your shop's plan.

* ZIP\_вЂ‹IS\_вЂ‹EMPTY

  Zip is empty.

* ZIP\_вЂ‹TOO\_вЂ‹LARGE

  May not be used to fetch a file bigger than 50MB.

<a id="theme-role"></a>

## ThemeвЂ‹Role

enum

The role of the theme.

### Valid values

* ARCHIVED

  The theme is archived if a merchant changes their plan and exceeds the maximum number of themes allowed. Archived themes can be downloaded by merchant, but can not be customized or published until the plan is upgraded.

* DEMO

  The theme is installed as a trial from the Shopify Theme Store. It can be customized using the theme editor, but access to the code editor and the ability to publish the theme are restricted until it is purchased.

* DEVELOPMENT

  The theme is automatically created by the CLI for previewing purposes when in a development session.

* LOCKED

  The theme is locked if it is identified as unlicensed. Customization and publishing are restricted until the merchant resolves the licensing issue.

* MAIN

  The currently published theme. There can only be one main theme at any time.

* UNPUBLISHED

  The theme is currently not published. It can be transitioned to the main role if it is published by the merchant.

* MOBILE

  Deprecated

***

### Fields

* [OnlineвЂ‹StoreвЂ‹Theme.role](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/OnlineStoreTheme#field-OnlineStoreTheme.fields.role)

  OBJECT

  A theme for display on the storefront. Themes control the visual appearance and functionality of the online store through templates, stylesheets, and assets that determine how [products](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/Product), [collections](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/Collection), and other content display to customers.

  Each theme has a [role](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/OnlineStoreTheme#field-OnlineStoreTheme.fields.role) that indicates its status. Main themes are live on the storefront, unpublished themes are inactive, demo themes require purchase before publishing, and development themes are temporary for previewing during development. The theme includes [translations](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/OnlineStoreTheme#field-OnlineStoreTheme.fields.translations) for multi-language support.

* [QueryвЂ‹Root.themes(roles)](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/QueryRoot#field-QueryRoot.fields.themes.arguments.roles)

  ARGUMENT

  The schema's entry-point for queries. This acts as the public, top-level API from which all queries must start.

<a id="transaction-sort-keys"></a>

## TransactionвЂ‹SortвЂ‹Keys

enum

The set of valid sort keys for the Transaction query.

### Valid values

* CREATED\_вЂ‹AT

  Sort by the `created_at` value.

* EXPIRES\_вЂ‹AT

  Sort by the `expires_at` value.

***

* [StoreвЂ‹CreditвЂ‹Account.transactions(sortKey)](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/StoreCreditAccount#field-StoreCreditAccount.fields.transactions.arguments.sortKey)

  ARGUMENT

  A store credit account contains a monetary balance that can be redeemed at checkout for purchases in the shop. The account is held in the specified currency and has an owner that cannot be transferred.

  The account balance is redeemable at checkout only when the owner is authenticated via [new customer accounts authentication](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/customer).

<a id="translatable-resource-type"></a>

## TranslatableвЂ‹ResourceвЂ‹Type

enum

Specifies the type of resources that are translatable.

### Valid values

* ARTICLE

  A blog post. Translatable fields: `title`, `body_html`, `summary_html`, `handle`, `meta_title`, `meta_description`.

* ARTICLE\_вЂ‹IMAGE

  An article image. Translatable fields: `alt`.

* BLOG

  A blog. Translatable fields: `title`, `handle`, `meta_title`, `meta_description`.

* COLLECTION

  A product collection. Translatable fields: `title`, `body_html`, `handle`, `meta_title`, `meta_description`.

* COLLECTION\_вЂ‹IMAGE

  A collection image. Translatable fields: `alt`.

* DELIVERY\_вЂ‹METHOD\_вЂ‹DEFINITION

  The delivery method definition. For example, "Standard", or "Expedited". Translatable fields: `name`, `description`.

* EMAIL\_вЂ‹TEMPLATE

  An email template. Translatable fields: `title`, `body_html`.

* FILTER

  A filter. Translatable fields: `label`.

* LINK

  A link to direct users. Translatable fields: `title`.

* MEDIA\_вЂ‹IMAGE

  An image. Translatable fields: `alt`.

* MENU

  A category of links. Translatable fields: `title`.

* METAFIELD

  A Metafield. Translatable fields: `value`.

* METAOBJECT

  A Metaobject. Translatable fields are determined by the Metaobject type.

* ONLINE\_вЂ‹STORE\_вЂ‹THEME

  An online store theme. Translatable fields: `dynamic keys based on theme data`.

* ONLINE\_вЂ‹STORE\_вЂ‹THEME\_вЂ‹APP\_вЂ‹EMBED

  A theme app embed. Translatable fields: `dynamic keys based on theme data`.

* ONLINE\_вЂ‹STORE\_вЂ‹THEME\_вЂ‹JSON\_вЂ‹TEMPLATE

  A theme json template. Translatable fields: `dynamic keys based on theme data`.

* ONLINE\_вЂ‹STORE\_вЂ‹THEME\_вЂ‹LOCALE\_вЂ‹CONTENT

  Locale file content of an online store theme. Translatable fields: `dynamic keys based on theme data`.

* ONLINE\_вЂ‹STORE\_вЂ‹THEME\_вЂ‹SECTION\_вЂ‹GROUP

  A theme json section group. Translatable fields: `dynamic keys based on theme data`.

* ONLINE\_вЂ‹STORE\_вЂ‹THEME\_вЂ‹SETTINGS\_вЂ‹CATEGORY

  A theme setting category. Translatable fields: `dynamic keys based on theme data`.

* ONLINE\_вЂ‹STORE\_вЂ‹THEME\_вЂ‹SETTINGS\_вЂ‹DATA\_вЂ‹SECTIONS

  Shared static sections of an online store theme. Translatable fields: `dynamic keys based on theme data`.

* PACKING\_вЂ‹SLIP\_вЂ‹TEMPLATE

  A packing slip template. Translatable fields: `body`.

* PAGE

  A page. Translatable fields: `title`, `body_html`, `handle`, `meta_title`, `meta_description`.

* PAYMENT\_вЂ‹GATEWAY

  A payment gateway. Translatable fields: `name`, `message`, `before_payment_instructions`.

* PRODUCT

  An online store product. Translatable fields: `title`, `body_html`, `handle`, `product_type`, `meta_title`, `meta_description`.

* PRODUCT\_вЂ‹OPTION

  An online store custom product property name. For example, "Size", "Color", or "Material". Translatable fields: `name`.

* PRODUCT\_вЂ‹OPTION\_вЂ‹VALUE

  The product option value names. For example, "Red", "Blue", and "Green" for a "Color" option. Translatable fields: `name`.

* SELLING\_вЂ‹PLAN

  A selling plan. Translatable fields:`name`, `option1`, `option2`, `option3`, `description`.

* SELLING\_вЂ‹PLAN\_вЂ‹GROUP

  A selling plan group. Translatable fields: `name`, `option1`, `option2`, `option3`.

* SHOP

  A shop. Translatable fields: `meta_title`, `meta_description`.

* SHOP\_вЂ‹POLICY

  A shop policy. Translatable fields: `body`.

***

### Fields

* [TranslatableвЂ‹Resource.nestedTranslatableResources(resourceType)](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/TranslatableResource#field-TranslatableResource.fields.nestedTranslatableResources.arguments.resourceType)

  ARGUMENT

  A resource in Shopify that contains fields available for translation into different languages. Accesses the resource's translatable content, existing [`Translation`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/Translation) objects, and any nested resources that can also be translated.

  The [`TranslatableContent`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/TranslatableContent) includes field keys, values, and digest hashes needed when [registering translations](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/mutations/translationsRegister).

  You can retrieve translations for specific [`Locale`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/Locale) and [`Market`](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/Market) configurations. Each translation includes an `outdated` flag indicating whether the original content has changed since that translation was last updated.

  Learn more about [managing translated content](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/markets/manage-translated-content).

* [QueryвЂ‹Root.translatableResources(resourceType)](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/QueryRoot#field-QueryRoot.fields.translatableResources.arguments.resourceType)

  ARGUMENT

  The schema's entry-point for queries. This acts as the public, top-level API from which all queries must start.

* [translatableвЂ‹Resources.resourceType](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/queries/translatableResources#arguments-resourceType)

  ARGUMENT

***

### Map

#### Arguments with this enum

* [TranslatableвЂ‹Resource.nestedTranslatableResources(resourceType)](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/TranslatableResource#field-TranslatableResource.fields.nestedTranslatableResources.arguments.resourceType)
* [QueryвЂ‹Root.translatableResources(resourceType)](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/QueryRoot#field-QueryRoot.fields.translatableResources.arguments.resourceType)
* [translatableвЂ‹Resources.resourceType](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/queries/translatableResources#arguments-resourceType)

<a id="translation-error-code"></a>

## TranslationвЂ‹ErrorвЂ‹Code

enum

Possible error codes that can be returned by `TranslationUserError`.

### Valid values

* BLANK

  The input value is blank.

* FAILS\_вЂ‹RESOURCE\_вЂ‹VALIDATION

  Translation value is invalid.

* INVALID

  The input value is invalid.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹CODE

  Locale language code is invalid.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹FORMAT

  Locale code format is invalid.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹KEY\_вЂ‹FOR\_вЂ‹MODEL

  Translation key is invalid.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹LOCALE\_вЂ‹FOR\_вЂ‹SHOP

  Locale is invalid for the shop.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹MARKET\_вЂ‹LOCALIZABLE\_вЂ‹CONTENT

  Market localizable content is invalid.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹TRANSLATABLE\_вЂ‹CONTENT

  Translatable content is invalid.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹VALUE\_вЂ‹FOR\_вЂ‹HANDLE\_вЂ‹TRANSLATION

  The handle is already taken for this resource.

* MARKET\_вЂ‹CUSTOM\_вЂ‹CONTENT\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹ALLOWED

  The shop isn't allowed to operate on market custom content.

* MARKET\_вЂ‹DOES\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹EXIST

  The market corresponding to the `marketId` argument doesn't exist.

* MARKET\_вЂ‹LOCALE\_вЂ‹CREATION\_вЂ‹FAILED

  The market override locale creation failed.

* RESOURCE\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹FOUND

  Resource does not exist.

* RESOURCE\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹MARKET\_вЂ‹CUSTOMIZABLE

  The specified resource can't be customized for a market.

* RESOURCE\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹TRANSLATABLE

  Resource is not translatable.

* TOO\_вЂ‹MANY\_вЂ‹KEYS\_вЂ‹FOR\_вЂ‹RESOURCE

  Too many translation keys for the resource.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹LOCALE\_вЂ‹FOR\_вЂ‹MARKET

  Deprecated

***

### Fields

<a id="unit-price-measurement-measured-unit"></a>

## UnitвЂ‹PriceвЂ‹MeasurementвЂ‹MeasuredвЂ‹Unit

enum

The valid units of measurement for a unit price measurement.

### Valid values

* CL

  100 centiliters equals 1 liter.

* CM

  100 centimeters equals 1 meter.

* FLOZ

  Imperial system unit of volume (U.S. customary unit).

* FT

  1 foot equals 12 inches.

* FT2

  Imperial system unit of area.

* G

  Metric system unit of weight.

* GAL

  1 gallon equals 128 fluid ounces (U.S. customary unit).

* IN

  Imperial system unit of length.

* ITEM

  1 item, a unit of count.

* KG

  1 kilogram equals 1000 grams.

* L

  Metric system unit of volume.

* LB

  Imperial system unit of weight.

* M

  Metric system unit of length.

* M2

  Metric system unit of area.

* M3

  1 cubic meter equals 1000 liters.

* MG

  1000 milligrams equals 1 gram.

* ML

  1000 milliliters equals 1 liter.

* MM

  1000 millimeters equals 1 meter.

* OZ

  16 ounces equals 1 pound.

* PT

  1 pint equals 16 fluid ounces (U.S. customary unit).

* QT

  1 quart equals 32 fluid ounces (U.S. customary unit).

* UNKNOWN

  The unit of measurement is unknown. Upgrade to the latest version of the API to resolve this unit.

* YD

  1 yard equals 36 inches.

***

<a id="unit-system"></a>

## UnitвЂ‹System

enum

Systems of weights and measures.

### Valid values

* IMPERIAL\_вЂ‹SYSTEM

  Imperial system of weights and measures.

* METRIC\_вЂ‹SYSTEM

  Metric system of weights and measures.

***

### Fields

* [Shop.unitSystem](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/Shop#field-Shop.fields.unitSystem)

  OBJECT

  The central configuration and settings hub for a Shopify store. Access business information, operational preferences, feature availability, and store-wide settings that control how the shop operates.

  Includes core business details like the shop name, contact emails, billing address, and currency settings. The shop configuration determines customer account requirements, available sales channels, enabled features, payment settings, and policy documents. Also provides access to shop-level resources such as staff members, fulfillment services, navigation settings, and storefront access tokens.

***

enum

The set of valid sort keys for the UrlRedirect query.

### Valid values

* ID

  Sort by the `id` value.

* PATH

  Sort by the `path` value.

* RELEVANCE

  Sort by relevance to the search terms when the `query` parameter is specified on the connection. Don't use this sort key when no search query is specified.

<a id="validation-user-error-code"></a>

## ValidationвЂ‹UserвЂ‹ErrorвЂ‹Code

enum

Possible error codes that can be returned by `ValidationUserError`.

### Valid values

* APP\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹AUTHORIZED

  ApiPermission metafields can only be created or updated by the app owner.

* BLANK

  The input value is blank.

* CAPABILITY\_вЂ‹VIOLATION

  The metafield violates a capability restriction.

* CUSTOM\_вЂ‹APP\_вЂ‹FUNCTION\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹ELIGIBLE

  Shop must be on a Shopify Plus plan to activate functions from a custom app.

* DISALLOWED\_вЂ‹OWNER\_вЂ‹TYPE

  Owner type can't be used in this mutation.

* FUNCTION\_вЂ‹DOES\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹IMPLEMENT

  Function does not implement the required interface for this cart & checkout validation.

* FUNCTION\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹FOUND

  Function not found.

* FUNCTION\_вЂ‹PENDING\_вЂ‹DELETION

  Function is pending deletion.

* INCLUSION

  The input value isn't included in the list.

* INTERNAL\_вЂ‹ERROR

  An internal error occurred.

* INVALID

  The input value is invalid.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹TYPE

  The type is invalid.

* INVALID\_вЂ‹VALUE

  The value is invalid for the metafield type or for the definition options.

* MAX\_вЂ‹VALIDATIONS\_вЂ‹ACTIVATED

  Cannot have more than 25 active validation functions.

* MISSING\_вЂ‹FUNCTION\_вЂ‹IDENTIFIER

  Either function\_id or function\_handle must be provided.

* MULTIPLE\_вЂ‹FUNCTION\_вЂ‹IDENTIFIERS

  Only one of function\_id or function\_handle can be provided, not both.

* NOT\_вЂ‹FOUND

  Validation not found.

* PRESENT

  The input value needs to be blank.

* PUBLIC\_вЂ‹APP\_вЂ‹NOT\_вЂ‹ALLOWED

  Only unlisted apps can be used for this cart & checkout validation.

* TAKEN

  The input value is already taken.

* TOO\_вЂ‹LONG

  The input value is too long.

* TOO\_вЂ‹SHORT

  The input value is too short.

* UNSTRUCTURED\_вЂ‹RESERVED\_вЂ‹NAMESPACE

  Unstructured reserved namespace.

***

### Fields

* [ValidationвЂ‹UserвЂ‹Error.code](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/ValidationUserError#field-ValidationUserError.fields.code)

  OBJECT

  An error that occurs during the execution of a validation mutation.

***

### Map

#### Fields with this enum

* [ValidationвЂ‹UserвЂ‹Error.code](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/ValidationUserError#field-ValidationUserError.fields.code)

<a id="webhook-subscription-format"></a>

## WebhookвЂ‹SubscriptionвЂ‹Format

enum

The supported formats for webhook subscriptions.

### Valid values

* JSON
* XML

***

### Fields

* [EventвЂ‹BridgeвЂ‹WebhookвЂ‹SubscriptionвЂ‹Input.format](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/input-objects/EventBridgeWebhookSubscriptionInput#fields-format)

  INPUT OBJECT

  The input fields for an EventBridge webhook subscription.

* [PubвЂ‹SubвЂ‹WebhookвЂ‹SubscriptionвЂ‹Input.format](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/input-objects/PubSubWebhookSubscriptionInput#fields-format)

  INPUT OBJECT

  The input fields for a PubSub webhook subscription.

* [WebhookвЂ‹Subscription.format](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/objects/WebhookSubscription#field-WebhookSubscription.fields.format)

  OBJECT

  A webhook subscription is a persisted data object created by an app using the REST Admin API or GraphQL Admin API. It describes the topic that the app wants to receive, and a destination where Shopify should send webhooks of the specified topic. When an event for a given topic occurs, the webhook subscription sends a relevant payload to the destination. Learn more about the [webhooks system](https://shopify.dev/apps/webhooks).

* [WebhookвЂ‹SubscriptionвЂ‹Input.format](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/input-objects/WebhookSubscriptionInput#fields-format)

  INPUT OBJECT

  The input fields for a webhook subscription.

  ARGUMENT

  The schema's entry-point for queries. This acts as the public, top-level API from which all queries must start.

* [webhookвЂ‹Subscriptions.format](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin-graphql/latest/queries/webhookSubscriptions#arguments-format)

  ARGUMENT

***
